title: avena elatior f. pilifera
intro: Avena elatior f. pilifera, also known as wild oat, is a flowering plant species in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the nervous system and promote relaxation. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. Avena elatior f. pilifera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used in herbal supplements and infusions to promote relaxation and well-being.
